---
title: "sanitizeFlowColumns()"
description: "Clamp a flow column definition to finite, non-negative values."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Clamp a flow column definition to finite, non-negative values.

## Import

```ts
import { sanitizeFlowColumns } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function sanitizeFlowColumns(columns: FlowColumns): FlowColumns
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `columns` | `FlowColumns` | Input column values. |

## Returns

A sanitized column record.

## Example

```ts
sanitizeFlowColumns({ count: 0, gap: -8 });
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/flow.ts`
